001import java.util.HashMap;
002
003import java.io.File;
004import java.io.FileNotFoundException;
005import java.util.Scanner;
006
007/**
008 * GameEngine class - handles the game logic of the text adventure "Henriette's Feast".
009 * It processes commands, manages the current room and movement history,
010 * and interacts with the user interface.
011 *
012 * @author Michael Kolling and David J. Barnes + D. Bureau + Raphaël Quillaud
013 * @version 2026.05.09
014 */
015public class GameEngine {
016    private Player aPlayer;
017    private Parser aParser;
018    private HashMap<String, Room> aRooms;
019    private UserInterface aGui;
020
021    /**
022     * Constructor for GameEngine.
023     * Initializes the rooms, parser, and movement history.
024     */
025    public GameEngine() {
026        this.aRooms = new HashMap<String, Room>();
027        this.aParser = new Parser();
028        this.createRooms();
029    }
030
031    /**
032     * Creates all rooms of the village and connects them with exits.
033     * Also sets the starting room (Henriette's kitchen).
034     */
035    private void createRooms() {
036        // Rooms
037        Room vKitchen       = new Room("in Henriette's warm, cosy kitchen","Images/kitchen.jpg");
038        Room vLivingRoom    = new Room("in the living room, next to the Christmas tree","Images/livingRoom.jpg");
039        Room vGarden        = new Room("in the snowy front garden of the house","Images/garden.jpg");
040        Room vUnderTreeHouse = new Room("under the tree house, in the snow","Images/underTreeHouse.jpg");
041        Room vTreeHouse     = new Room("in the children's tree house","Images/treeHouse.jpg");
042        Room vFrontHouse    = new Room("in the street, right in front of Henriette's house", "Images/frontHouse.jpg");
043        Room vThereseHouse  = new Room("in Thérèse's house, the neighbour. Look ! She left a cookie on the table with a note that says : 'You'll thank me later ;)'", "Images/thereseHouse.jpg");
044        Room vHouseStreet   = new Room("in the quiet street in front of the houses", "Images/houseStreet.jpg");
045        Room vBakery        = new Room("in the bakery that smells of fresh bread", "Images/bakery.jpg");
046        Room vMainStreet    = new Room("on the main street decorated with garlands", "Images/mainStreet.jpg");
047        Room vButcherShop   = new Room("in the butcher's shop, where a savoury smell of roasts fills the air", "Images/butcherShop.jpg");
048        Room vMainSquare    = new Room("on the village square, under the huge sparkling Christmas tree", "Images/mainSquare.jpg");
049        Room vGrocery       = new Room("in the small village grocery store", "Images/grocery.jpg");
050
051        // Store Rooms in the map
052        this.aRooms.put("kitchen", vKitchen);
053        this.aRooms.put("livingRoom", vLivingRoom);
054        this.aRooms.put("garden", vGarden);
055        this.aRooms.put("underTreeHouse", vUnderTreeHouse);
056        this.aRooms.put("treeHouse", vTreeHouse);
057        this.aRooms.put("frontHouse", vFrontHouse);
058        this.aRooms.put("thereseHouse", vThereseHouse);
059        this.aRooms.put("houseStreet", vHouseStreet);
060        this.aRooms.put("bakery", vBakery);
061        this.aRooms.put("mainStreet", vMainStreet);
062        this.aRooms.put("butcherShop", vButcherShop);
063        this.aRooms.put("mainSquare", vMainSquare);
064        this.aRooms.put("grocery", vGrocery);
065
066        // Exits
067            // Kitchen
068        vKitchen.setExit("east", vLivingRoom);
069
070            // Living room
071        vLivingRoom.setExit("east", vGarden);
072        vLivingRoom.setExit("west", vKitchen);
073
074            // Garden
075        vGarden.setExit("north", vUnderTreeHouse);
076        vGarden.setExit("east", vFrontHouse);
077        vGarden.setExit("west", vLivingRoom);
078
079            // Under Treehouse
080        vUnderTreeHouse.setExit("south", vGarden);
081        vUnderTreeHouse.setExit("up", vTreeHouse);
082
083            // Treehouse
084        vTreeHouse.setExit("down", vUnderTreeHouse);
085
086            // Front of the house
087        vFrontHouse.setExit("south", vHouseStreet);
088        vFrontHouse.setExit("west", vGarden);
089
090            // Therese's house
091        vThereseHouse.setExit("north", vGarden);
092        vThereseHouse.setExit("east", vHouseStreet);
093
094            // House street
095        vHouseStreet.setExit("north", vFrontHouse);
096        vHouseStreet.setExit("south", vMainStreet);
097        vHouseStreet.setExit("west", vThereseHouse);
098
099            // Bakery
100        vBakery.setExit("east", vMainStreet);
101
102            // Main street
103        vMainStreet.setExit("north", vHouseStreet);
104        vMainStreet.setExit("east", vButcherShop);
105        vMainStreet.setExit("south", vMainSquare);
106        vMainStreet.setExit("west", vBakery);
107
108            // Butcher's shop
109        vButcherShop.setExit("west", vMainStreet);
110
111            // Main square
112        vMainSquare.setExit("north", vMainStreet);
113        vMainSquare.setExit("east", vGrocery);
114        vMainSquare.setExit("west", vKitchen);
115
116            // Grocery
117        vGrocery.setExit("west", vMainSquare);
118
119        // Items
120        Item vRecipeBook = new Item("book", "Henriette's Christmas recipe book", 2);
121        Item vFlour = new Item("flour","a bag of flour", 1);
122        Item vButter = new Item("butter","a block of butter", 1);
123        Item vSugar = new Item("sugar", "a packet of sugar", 1);
124        Item vChocolate = new Item("chocolate", "a bar of dark chocolate", 1);
125        Item vTurkey = new Item("turkey","a beautiful Christmas turkey", 5);
126        Item vSpices = new Item("spices","a small box of Christmas spices", 1);
127        Item vWoodLog = new Item("log","a dry log for the fireplace", 6);
128        Item vPlate = new Item("plate", "a large serving plate, perfect for the Christmas dinner", 3);
129        Item vCookie = new Item("cookie", "a delicious cookie made by love by Thérèse. Why is it so heavy though ? ...", 5);
130
131        Beamer vBeamer = new Beamer("beamer", "a mysterious teleportation device. Be careful, you can only use it once...", 3);
132
133        // Place items in rooms
134        vKitchen.addItem(vRecipeBook);
135        vBakery.addItem(vFlour);
136        vGrocery.addItem(vButter);
137        vGrocery.addItem(vSpices);
138        vGrocery.addItem(vSugar);
139        vGrocery.addItem(vChocolate);
140        vButcherShop.addItem(vTurkey);
141        vUnderTreeHouse.addItem(vWoodLog);
142        vThereseHouse.addItem(vCookie);
143        vThereseHouse.addItem(vPlate);
144
145        vTreeHouse.addItem(vBeamer);
146
147        this.aPlayer = new Player("Henriette", vKitchen, 5);
148    }
149
150    /**
151     * Tries to go to the room in the direction given by the command.
152     * If there is no second word or no exit in that direction,
153     * prints an error message.
154     *
155     * @param pCommand the command containing the direction
156     */
157    private void goRoom(final Command pCommand) {
158        if (!pCommand.hasSecondWord()) {
159            this.aGui.println("Go where ?");
160            return;
161        }
162
163        String vDirection = pCommand.getSecondWord();
164        Room vNextRoom = this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getExit(vDirection);
165
166        if (vNextRoom == null) {
167            this.aGui.println("There is no door !");
168            return;
169        }
170
171        this.aPlayer.goTo(vNextRoom);
172        printLocationInfo();
173    }
174
175    /**
176     * Executes the 'look' command. Prints the current room description
177     * and the items present in the room.
178     */
179    private void look() {
180        this.aGui.println(this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getLongDescription());
181    }
182
183    /**
184     * Executes the 'eat' command. If the player eats a cookie, their maximum 
185     * weight capacity is doubled. Other items cannot be eaten.
186     *
187     * @param pCommand the command containing the name of the item to eat
188     */
189    private void eat(final Command pCommand) {
190        String vItemName = pCommand.getSecondWord().toLowerCase();
191
192        if (!this.aPlayer.hasItem(vItemName)) {
193            this.aGui.println("You are not carrying any '" + vItemName + "'.");
194            return;
195        }
196
197        if (vItemName.equals("cookie")) {
198            this.aPlayer.drop(vItemName);
199            this.aPlayer.setMaxWeight(this.aPlayer.getMaxWeight() * 2);
200            this.aGui.println("You eat the cookie that Thérèse left you. You ask yourself why it is so heavy...");
201            this.aGui.println("Your carrying capacity has doubled ! " + this.aPlayer.getWeightString());
202        }
203        else {
204            this.aGui.println("You can't eat that ! Keep everything for the dinner...");
205        }
206    }
207
208    /**
209     * Moves the player back to the previous room, if available.
210     * If there are no previous rooms in the navigation history, 
211     * a message is displayed indicating that the action is not possible.
212     * Otherwise, the last visited room is retrieved from the stack 
213     * and set as the current room, and the location information is updated.
214     */
215    private void back() {
216        if (!this.aPlayer.goBack()) {
217            this.aGui.println("You can't go back !");
218            return;
219        }
220
221        printLocationInfo();
222    }
223
224    /**
225     * Picks up an item from the current room and adds it to the player's inventory.
226     * @param pCommand the command containing the name of the item to take
227     */
228    private void take(final Command pCommand) {
229        if (!pCommand.hasSecondWord()) {
230            this.aGui.println("Take what ?");
231            return;
232        }
233
234        String vItemName = pCommand.getSecondWord().toLowerCase();
235        Item vItem = this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getItem(vItemName);
236
237        if (vItem == null) {
238            this.aGui.println("There is no item called '" + vItemName + "' here.");
239            return;
240        }
241
242        if (!this.aPlayer.pickUp(vItem)) {
243            this.aGui.println("Too heavy ! " + this.aPlayer.getWeightString());
244            return;
245        }
246
247        this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().removeItem(vItemName);
248        this.aGui.println("You picked up : " + vItem.getName());
249    }
250
251    /**
252     * Drops the item currently carried by the player into the current room.
253     * @param pCommand the command containing the name of the item to drop
254     */
255    private void drop(final Command pCommand) {
256        if (!pCommand.hasSecondWord()) {
257            this.aGui.println("Drop what ? " + this.aPlayer.getInventoryString());
258            return;
259        }
260
261        String vItemName = pCommand.getSecondWord().toLowerCase();
262        Item vDropped = this.aPlayer.drop(vItemName);
263
264        if (vDropped == null) {
265            this.aGui.println("You are not carrying '" + vItemName + "'.");
266            return;
267        }
268
269        this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().addItem(vDropped);
270        this.aGui.println("You dropped : " + vDropped.getName());
271    }
272
273    /**
274     * Charges the beamer with the current room.
275     * @param pCommand the command containing the beamer name
276     */
277    private void charge(final Command pCommand) {
278        if (!pCommand.hasSecondWord()) {
279            this.aGui.println("Charge what ?");
280            return;
281        }
282
283        String vItemName = pCommand.getSecondWord().toLowerCase();
284        Item vItem = this.aPlayer.getItem(vItemName);
285
286        if (vItem == null) {
287            this.aGui.println("You are not carrying '" + vItemName + "'.");
288            return;
289        }
290
291        if (!(vItem instanceof Beamer)) {
292            this.aGui.println("You can't charge that !");
293            return;
294        }
295
296        ((Beamer) vItem).charge(this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom());
297        this.aGui.println("Beamer charged ! It will bring you back " + this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getDescription());
298    }
299
300    /**
301     * Fires the beamer, teleporting the player to the charged room.
302     * @param pCommand the command containing the beamer name
303     */
304    private void fire(final Command pCommand) {
305        if (!pCommand.hasSecondWord()) {
306            this.aGui.println("Fire what ?");
307            return;
308        }
309
310        String vItemName = pCommand.getSecondWord().toLowerCase();
311        Item vItem = this.aPlayer.getItem(vItemName);
312
313        if (vItem == null) {
314            this.aGui.println("You are not carrying '" + vItemName + "'.");
315            return;
316        }
317
318        if (!(vItem instanceof Beamer)) {
319            this.aGui.println("You can't fire that !");
320            return;
321        }
322
323        Beamer vBeamer = (Beamer) vItem;
324
325        if (!vBeamer.isCharged()) {
326            this.aGui.println("The beamer is not charged !");
327            return;
328        }
329
330        this.aPlayer.goTo(vBeamer.fire());
331        this.aPlayer.drop(vItemName);
332        this.aGui.println("*WHOOSH* You have been teleported !");
333        printLocationInfo();
334    }
335
336    /**
337     * Tests the commands provided in a specified file by interpreting and executing them sequentially.
338     * The file should contain one command per line. Commands are ignored if the file is not found,
339     * or if the command cannot be interpreted.
340     * If the command does not have a second word specifying the file name, a usage message is displayed.
341     * If the specified file cannot be located, an error message is displayed.
342     *
343     * @param pCommand the command containing the file name as the second word
344     */
345    private void test(final Command pCommand) {
346        if (!pCommand.hasSecondWord()) {
347            this.aGui.println("Test which file ? Usage : test <filename>");
348            return;
349        }
350
351        String vFileName = pCommand.getSecondWord() + ".txt";
352
353        try {
354            Scanner vScanner = new Scanner(new File(vFileName));
355            while (vScanner.hasNextLine()) {
356                String vLine = vScanner.nextLine().trim();
357                if (!vLine.isEmpty()) {
358                    this.interpretCommand(vLine);
359                }
360            }
361            vScanner.close();
362        } catch (FileNotFoundException e) {
363            this.aGui.println("Test file not found : " + vFileName);
364        }
365    }
366
367    /**
368     * Prints the welcome text and the initial location information.
369     */
370    private void printWelcome() {
371        this.aGui.println("""
372                
373                
374                *****************************
375                Welcome to "Henriette's Feast" !
376                It is Christmas Eve in a small, snowy village.
377                Grandma Henriette must prepare the big Christmas dinner
378                for the whole family, but she suddenly realizes she forgot
379                to do all the Christmas shopping.
380                
381                Explore the village, gather everything she needs
382                for the dinner, and come back to the kitchen in time !
383                
384                Type 'help' if you need help.
385                """);
386
387        printLocationInfo();
388    }
389
390    /**
391     * Prints the current room description and its available exits.
392     */
393    private void printLocationInfo() {
394        this.aGui.println("\n" + this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getLongDescription() + "\n");
395        this.aGui.println("[ " + this.aPlayer.getRemainingMoves() + " moves remaining ]");
396
397        if (this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getImageName() != null) {
398            this.aGui.showImage(this.aPlayer.getCurrentRoom().getImageName());
399        }
400    }
401
402    /**
403     * Prints a help message describing the game objective
404     * and the available commands.
405     */
406    private void printHelp() {
407        this.aGui.println("""
408                You are Grandma Henriette in a small snowy village.
409                You must find everything you need for the Christmas dinner.
410                
411                Your command words are:""");
412        this.aGui.println(this.aParser.getCommandList());
413    }
414
415    /**
416     * Interprets and executes the given command line.
417     *
418     * @param pCommandLine the command line entered by the user
419     */
420    public void interpretCommand(final String pCommandLine) {
421        this.aGui.println("> " + pCommandLine);
422        Command vCommand = this.aParser.getCommand(pCommandLine);
423
424        if (vCommand.isUnknown()) {
425            this.aGui.println("I don't know what you mean...");
426            return;
427        }
428
429        String vCommandWord = vCommand.getCommandWord();
430
431        if (!vCommandWord.equals("help") && !vCommandWord.equals("quit") && !vCommandWord.equals("test")) {
432            this.aPlayer.incrementMoves();
433            if (this.aPlayer.isOutOfTime()) {
434                this.aGui.println("\nIt's midnight ! The family has arrived but there is nothing ready...");
435                this.aGui.println("Henriette has failed. Game over !");
436                this.endGame();
437                return;
438            }
439            // Avertissement à 10 coups restants
440            if (this.aPlayer.getRemainingMoves() == 10) {
441                this.aGui.println("⚠ Hurry up ! Only 10 moves left before midnight !");
442            }
443        }
444
445        switch (vCommandWord) {
446            case "go" :
447                this.goRoom(vCommand);
448                break;
449
450            case "help" :
451                this.printHelp();
452                break;
453
454            case "look" :
455                if (vCommand.hasSecondWord()) {
456                    this.aGui.println("You can't look at something in particular.");
457                }
458                else {
459                    this.look();
460                }
461                break;
462
463            case "eat" :
464                if (!vCommand.hasSecondWord()) {
465                    this.aGui.println("Eat what ?");
466                }
467                else {
468                    this.eat(vCommand);
469                }
470                break;
471
472            case "quit" :
473                if (vCommand.hasSecondWord()) {
474                    this.aGui.println("Quit what ?");
475                }
476                else {
477                    this.endGame();
478                }
479                break;
480
481            case "back" :
482                if (vCommand.hasSecondWord()) {
483                    this.aGui.println("Back what ?");
484                }
485                else {
486                    this.back();
487                }
488                break;
489
490            case "test" :
491                this.test(vCommand);
492                break;
493
494            case "take" :
495                this.take(vCommand);
496                break;
497
498            case "drop" :
499                this.drop(vCommand);
500                break;
501
502            case "items" :
503                this.aGui.println(this.aPlayer.getInventoryString());
504                this.aGui.println(this.aPlayer.getWeightString());
505                break;
506
507            case "charge" :
508                this.charge(vCommand);
509                break;
510
511            case "fire" :
512                this.fire(vCommand);
513                break;
514
515            default :
516                this.aGui.println("Programmer error: command not recognised!");
517                break;
518        }
519    }
520
521    /**
522     * Stores the graphical user interface and prints the welcome message.
523     *
524     * @param pUserInterface the graphical user interface of the game
525     */
526    public void setGUI(final UserInterface pUserInterface) {
527        this.aGui = pUserInterface;
528        this.printWelcome();
529    }
530
531    /**
532     * Ends the game by printing a goodbye message and disabling input.
533     */
534    private void endGame() {
535        this.aGui.println("Thank you for playing. Goodbye.");
536        this.aGui.enable(false);
537    }
538
539} // GameEngine
